name: Hearty Corn Bread W/Cheese and Sun-Dried Toma
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour hot water over the dried tomato bits and let sit until softened.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
3. In a large bowl, combine cornmeal and baking soda. Mix well.
4. Stir in melted butter, eggs, cream-style corn, garlic, onion, mozzarella, basil, and pepper. Mix until just combined.
5. Stir the drained tomato bits into the batter, then add sour cream.
6. Heat an oiled cast-iron skillet or large casserole dish over high heat until sizzling.
7. Pour in the batter and bake for 50-60 minutes, or until golden brown and firm but not hard.
